Creator and technology

Credits and licenses

Paper Flock production release · v1.2

Creation and publishing

Paper Flock is created and published by Gamelo Studio.

Technology

The player runtime uses standards-based HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Web Audio, local browser storage, service workers, and the Web App Manifest.

Runtime dependencies

The production player runtime has no third-party package, advertising SDK, or tracking SDK.

Art and audio

The included origami artwork, interface assets, and synthesized audio are part of the Paper Flock project.
